scripts.check: npm run prisma:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke
scripts.release:check: npm run env:doctor && npm run prisma:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke
scripts.release:deep-check: npm run env:doctor && npm run static:audit && npm run routes:inventory && npm run prisma:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke

scripts.release:v10-check: npm run env:doctor && npm run brand:audit && npm run partner:contract && npm run governance:seed-check && npm run v10:readiness && npm run sdk:contract && npm run static:audit && npm run routes:inventory && npm run handoff:score && npm run demo:package && npm run prisma:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke
scripts.release:v11-check: npm run env:doctor && npm run tenant:boundary && npm run cost:guard && npm run v11:readiness && npm run launch:package && npm run governance:seed-check && npm run v10:readiness && npm run sdk:contract && npm run static:audit && npm run routes:inventory && npm run handoff:score && npm run demo:package && npm run prisma:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke
scripts.release:v12-check: npm run env:doctor && npm run provider:health && npm run acceptance:run && npm run domain:readiness && npm run secret:rotation && npm run observability:slo && npm run v12:readiness && npm run release:v11-check
scripts.release:v13-check: npm run contract:generate && npm run errors:audit && npm run metering:audit && npm run pilot:onboarding && npm run release:gates && npm run v13:readiness && npm run release:v12-check
